mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, NICKNAME AS nickname, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_STATUS AS memberStatus, TO_CHAR(EMAIL_VERIFIED) AS emailVerified, PROFILE_IMAGE AS profileImage, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt, DELETE_REQUESTED_AT AS deleteRequestedAt, DELETED_AT AS deletedAt, HARD_DELETE_AT AS hardDeleteAt FROM app_member where member_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET ROLE = #{role}, STATUS = #{status}, MEMBER_STATUS = #{memberStatus}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
